text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to campus, we pass by the park
where the rascals' leader hangs out, but she's
nowhere to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I guess she's not here today either... I haven't seen
her around at all recently.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried she's bedridden from eating too much
food. Or maybe she pulled a muscle practicing a
Princess Fighter transformation sequence...

text_block_list.name: Former Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for the boss, you won't find her
here anymore.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Former Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text: Yeah. She's moving away.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What?! She's moving?! She didn't say anything
about that to me!
choice_data_list: Maybe it's too hard for her to say goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Former Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text:
That's what I think too. She told her other friends
not to go see her off either...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's... I won't accept it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No matter how painful it might be, parting
without saying a proper goodbye isn't
princess-like in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, tell me where she lives, right NOW!

text_block_list.name: Former Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text:
Y-you won't make it in time! She said she'd be
gone by this evening!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if she's already departed... A princess
won't fail to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hurry to the address the boy shared with us,
only to see a car leaving in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Former Timid Rascal
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... It's no good. We're too late!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Not so! We're just in time! I can see her baseball
cap through the rear window!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Catching a car will be a piece of cake for a
princess! Graaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess bolts off at full speed and
rapidly gains ground on the traveling car!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Stop right theeere! PLEEEASE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shouts at the top of her lungs, running side by
side with the car. Eventually, it comes to a stop.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: I-I, um...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I understand. You were upset. Being separated
from you is hard for me too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
However! That doesn't mean you can just
disappear without saying a proper farewell! All
you're doing is running from reality!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's not the conduct of a princess! If you run
away now, then what's that mean for you in your
new home?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Every princess must face times of struggle,
discontent, and sadness. Today is one of those
times...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why you must meet the challenge head-on
and carve a path forward! That's how you
demonstrate your princessly spirit!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So promise me one thing! When you encounter
difficulties in your new town, face them with
everything you have!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you can do that, you'll be fine! And I know
you'll make a bunch of new friends in no time at
all!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... All right, Sis!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If there's ever a time when you feel like you're
losing heart, then watch one of my races on TV.
Seeing a princess in action will remind you of
what's important!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll watch. I'll definitely watch you! 'Cause... 'cause
we're...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: We're friends forever, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! We're true friends! Princess pals! Princess
sisters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying her goodbyes, Kawakami Princess
watches the car depart with a gentle expression
on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that expression, I see a hint of her beloved
Princess Fighter—a heroine who proudly fights on
to protect the peace.
choice_data_list:
You'll have to work hard for that girl's sake
too...

You'll have to work hard for that girl's sake
too...
Maybe you'll be able to run together one day.
Maybe you'll be able to run together one day.

Someone else will have to carry on the role of
rascal leader...

Someone else will have to carry on the role of
rascal leader...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that expression, I see a hint of her beloved
Princess Fighter—a heroine who proudly fights on
to protect the peace.
choice_data_list:
You'll have to work hard for that girl's sake
too...

You'll have to work hard for that girl's sake
too...
Maybe you'll be able to run together one day.
Maybe you'll be able to run together one day.

Someone else will have to carry on the role of
rascal leader...

Someone else will have to carry on the role of
rascal leader...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course! I made a princess promise, after all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll also take the princess oath to heart
and give it her best in her new home!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And it's a princess's duty to work just as hard as
her friends! I'll have to train more vigorously than
ever before!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wha—?! That would be amazing if it came true!
I'm already raring to go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but in that case, how many more years will I
have to keep racing for?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! I could race for a hundred years if
need be!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm counting on you to stick with me
the whole way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh? O-oh, yes. I suppose they would need
someone to manage all their affairs...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They'd have to be great at games, physically
tough, and... Wait a minute.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: O-out of the question!
choice_data_list:
What happened to all that talk about facing
challenges head-on?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
B-but I've already put my past as a rascal leader
behind me!
